title: Casio Deck
settings.notify_on_press.label: Notify on press
settings.notify_on_press.description: Show a desktop notification when a watch button event is received.
settings.helper_command.label: Helper command
settings.helper_command.description: Command that runs the background watch listener and streams normalized watch events into the bridge service. Leave empty to use the bundled ABL-100WE helper from this plugin source.
settings.autostart_helper.label: Autostart helper
settings.autostart_helper.description: Start the configured helper automatically when the plugin loads. Enable this for normal background listener mode.
settings.stop_command.label: Stop command
settings.stop_command.description: Optional command used to stop the running background watch listener when the dashboard Stop listening button is pressed. Leave empty to use the bundled stop command.
settings.pair_command.label: Pair/setup command
settings.pair_command.description: Optional command the dashboard Pair button runs. Leave empty to use the bundled ABL-100WE setup flow.
settings.watch_model.label: Watch model
settings.watch_model.description: Select the trigger vocabulary the bridge should expect from the helper.
settings.saved_watch_name.label: Saved watch name
settings.saved_watch_name.description: Optional remembered watch name shown at startup before the helper reports a watch.
settings.saved_watch_address.label: Saved watch address
settings.saved_watch_address.description: Optional remembered BLE address. When set, the widget can show that a watch bond is expected even before a new helper session runs.
settings.trigger_action_map.label: Advanced trigger action map
settings.trigger_action_map.description: Optional newline or semicolon separated mappings such as lower_right=preset:media_play_pause or finder=command:notify-send Casio.
settings.youtube_channel_url.label: YouTube channel URL
settings.youtube_channel_url.description: LuixBits channel URL shown in the About tab.
settings.explanation_video_url.label: Explanation video URL
settings.explanation_video_url.descripti: Optional future video URL shown in the About tab.
settings.lower_left_preset.label: Long lower-left preset
settings.lower_left_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the long lower-left trigger.
settings.lower_left_command.label: Long lower-left command
settings.lower_left_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the long lower-left trigger.
settings.lower_right_preset.label: Short lower-right preset
settings.lower_right_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the short lower-right trigger.
settings.lower_right_command.label: Short lower-right command
settings.lower_right_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the short lower-right trigger.
settings.finder_preset.label: Long lower-right preset
settings.finder_preset.description: Preset action to run when the helper reports the long lower-right trigger.
settings.finder_command.label: Long lower-right command
settings.finder_command.description: Shell command to run when the helper reports the long lower-right trigger.
settings.widget.label.label: Label
settings.widget.label.description: Text shown next to the watch glyph in the bar.
settings.widget.show_label.label: Show label
settings.widget.show_label.description: Show text next to the watch glyph.
settings.widget.show_press_count.label: Show press count
settings.widget.show_press_count.descrip: Append the number of received button presses to the bar label.
settings.widget.hide_disconnected.label: Hide while disconnected
settings.widget.hide_disconnected.descri: Hide the bar widget until the bridge reports a connected watch.
